transcript: The former England international Gary Neville, now part of the England backroom team, is desperately trying to organise a reshape here. And Suarez is in behind England. Suarez to win it. Suarez wins it surely. More calamitous defending by England. And yet again, Suarez on hand to punish them. them he can't believe it he's in tears they're jubilant Uruguay take advantage of more woeful defending by England Suarez in behind and what a deadly finish one touch to control it and bang checks there to see where the goalkeeper is checks again and thumps it home
